# About the Author {.unnumbered}

![Photo of Michael Borck](images/author-photo.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of Michael Borck, the author" width=200px fig-align="center"}

**Michael Borck** is a software developer, educator, and auditor-by-training working at the
intersection of human expertise and artificial intelligence. He teaches information security,
and this book grew out of the introductory course he wanted to hand students — one that builds
the *defender's mindset* rather than a checklist of terms.

His book *Substantiate, Don't Assume* takes the same discipline into professional security
auditing; *Conversation, Not Delegation* argues that AI is most valuable not as a tool you
delegate to, but as a thinking partner you converse with. *Assume Breach* sits at the entry
point to that path: the first course, before the audit and before the profession.

Michael builds educational software and resources, and writes about the 80/20 principle in
learning and professional judgement.

---

\newpage

**Connect**

- [michaelborck.dev](https://michaelborck.dev) — Professional work and projects
- [michaelborck.education](https://michaelborck.education) — Educational software and resources
- [8020workshop.com](https://8020workshop.com) — Passion projects and workshops
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/michaelborck)

---

**Other Books in This Series**

*Security Track:*

- *Assume Breach: A First Course in Defensive Security* — this book
- *Substantiate, Don't Assume: Why the Auditor's Opinion Matters More Than Ever in the Age of AI*

*AI-Collaboration Track:*

- *Conversation, Not Delegation: How to Think With AI, Not Just Use It*
- *Partner, Don't Police: AI in the Business Classroom*

*Python Track:*

- *Think Python, Direct AI: Computational Thinking for Beginners*
- *Code Python, Consult AI: Python Fundamentals for the AI Era*
- *Ship Python, Orchestrate AI: Professional Python in the AI Era*
- *Converse Python, Partner AI: The Intentional Prompting Methodology*

*Web Track:*

- *Build Web, Guide AI: Business Web Development with AI*
